title: `aqab #6117
definition:
1) to supplant, circumvent, take by the heel, follow at the heel,
    assail insidiously, overreach
    1a) (Qal) to supplant, overreach, attack at the heel
    1b) (Piel) to hold back
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to supplant, circumvent, take by the heel, follow at the heel,
    assail insidiously, overreach
    1a) (Qal) to supplant, overreach, attack at the heel
    1b) (Piel) to hold back

    NASB:  to follow at the heel, assail insidiously, circumvent, overreach
